variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 8002 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 8002 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 8002 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 309.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 289.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 187.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 42.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 11.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P607300 Air Filter, Panel Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8002
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P607300 Air Filter, Panel Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 8002
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Cabin Air Filters? Filter irritants before they enter the vehicle cab to help operators breathe cleaner air. • High quality construction and tested to industry standards. • Durable, dependable and long-lasting. • Designed as a direct replacement for many OE applications.
